name: Bahamut

distinctive_features: immense size capable of holding the earth
supports a bull on its back
visual_attributes.size_and_scale: so large that all the seas of the world would fit in one nostril like a mustard seed
visual_attributes.structural_arrangement: fish-like body with a massive back supporting a bull

domain_specific_visual.cosmological_position: underpins the support structure of the earth

secondary_functions: part of a layered cosmological system

domain_specific_functional.role_in_cosmology: acts as a foundational layer in Islamic cosmography
domain_specific_functional.interaction_with_other_entities: supports a bull, which in turn supports a rock, an angel, and the earth

relationships.description: Bahamut supports the bull on its back as part of the cosmic structure
Bahamut is part of the foundational layers that support the earth

contextual_attributes.historical_period: pre-Islamic period to medieval Islamic era
contextual_attributes.geographic_range: Middle Eastern literary and mythological texts
contextual_attributes.cultural_significance: represents the vastness and mystery of the universe in Islamic cosmology

contrastive_constraints: NOT a generic fish or whale
NOT a modern or Western mythological entity
